title: Fishy's Camo Shulkers
description: Shulkers as Jeb originally intended them (or as close as I could get with a resource pack)
body:
I decided shulkers weren't annoying enough. Now they camouflage.

Oh yeah, the block texture will match whatever texturepack you have on underneath this

Oh and there's mimics from DND

**MUST HAVE ETF/EMF INSTALLED**

In-game, press escape, then click mods, then select ETF, click "configure" button on top right corner, click "property settings", scroll down and select "blocks", finally, **make sure "locked to spawn conditions is OFF.**

(OLD ETF) go to our .minecraft folder>config folder> entity_texture_features.json. open said file, then where it says " "restrictBlock": true,", change "true" to "false"


![Shulkers camouflaging in the overworld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/m8kjTloD/images/d771b5feda3d639ba2adf3795b93cc9ec74dc4c8.png)
